name: AwsProviderConnection
description: AWS account connection supporting inline, runner, and cross-account trust authentication modes.

fields.name: auth_mode
fields.description: Authentication mode. inline: credentials stored in spec; runner: runner uses its own environment credentials (IRSA, instance profile); cross_account_trust: STS AssumeRole with IAM role in customer account.

fields.name: runner
fields.description: Slug of a RunnerRegistration in the same organization. Required when auth_mode=runner, optional when auth_mode=inline.

fields.name: account_id
fields.description: AWS Account ID (numeric string, e.g. '123456789012'). Required for all auth modes.

fields.name: access_key_id
fields.description: AWS Access Key ID (20 chars, starts with AKIA or ASIA). Required when auth_mode=inline.

fields.name: secret_access_key
fields.description: AWS Secret Access Key (40 chars). Required when auth_mode=inline.

fields.name: session_token
fields.description: AWS Session Token for temporary security credentials (STS). Only needed with ASIA-prefixed access keys.

fields.name: iam_role_arn
fields.description: ARN of the IAM role for cross-account trust (e.g. 'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/planton-role'). Required when auth_mode=cross_account_trust.

fields.name: external_id
fields.description: UUID for confused deputy prevention in cross-account trust. Generated during CloudFormation setup. Required when auth_mode=cross_account_trust.
